name: DTaP Vaccine Codes (All Formulations)
description: CVX and CPT codes for diphtheria, tetanus toxoids, and acellular pertussis (DTaP) vaccines for children under 7 years, including combination vaccines. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Requires 4 doses by age 2. This value set includes all DTaP-containing formulations.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine (DTaP)
DTaP-Haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate vaccine
DTP — diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and pertussis vaccine (historical)
DTaP vaccine, for intramuscular use, younger than 7 years
DTaP-IPV vaccine (Kinrix, Quadracel), for intramuscular use
